machine_type: Atlas Copco GA series oil-injected rotary screw air compressor

operation_types.name: pressure_regulation
operation_types.description: Load/unload cycle where compressor automatically loads when pressure drops to loading pressure and unloads when pressure reaches unloading pressure

operation_types.name: maintenance_event
operation_types.description: Scheduled or unscheduled maintenance activities including filter changes, oil changes, separator replacement

operation_types.name: shutdown_event
operation_types.description: Compressor shutdown due to safety limits, overtemperature, or maintenance requirements

subsystems.name: pressure_control
subsystems.description: Elektronikon regulator system managing loading/unloading cycles via solenoid valve Y1, inlet valve, and unloading valve

subsystems.name: air_compression
subsystems.description: Screw compressor element with inlet valve, loading plunger, and air flow control

subsystems.name: oil_circulation
subsystems.description: Oil injection system including oil separator, oil filters, oil cooler, and oil level management

subsystems.name: cooling
subsystems.description: Air and oil cooling system with fan, air cooler, oil cooler, and temperature monitoring

subsystems.name: filtration
subsystems.description: Air intake filtration and compressed air treatment including air filter and service indicators

subsystems.name: air_treatment
subsystems.description: Full-feature air dryer system with refrigerant circuit for moisture removal

subsystems.name: thermal_protection
subsystems.description: Temperature monitoring and protection systems including TT11 sensor and shutdown logic

state_variables.name: oil_separator_fouling
state_variables.description: Gradual increase in oil separator differential pressure due to element fouling and oil degradation over service hours

state_variables.name: air_filter_restriction
state_variables.description: Progressive restriction of air filter element reducing air flow capacity

state_variables.name: cooler_fouling
state_variables.description: Accumulation of dirt and debris on cooler surfaces reducing heat transfer efficiency

state_variables.name: oil_degradation
state_variables.description: Progressive degradation of oil properties affecting lubrication and heat transfer

state_variables.name: pressure_regulation_drift
state_variables.description: Gradual drift in pressure sensor accuracy and control system calibration over time

state_variables.name: screw_element_wear
state_variables.description: Progressive wear of screw compressor rotors reducing volumetric efficiency

state_variables.name: sensor_drift
state_variables.description: Gradual drift in temperature sensor accuracy affecting protection and monitoring

usage_profiles.name: continuous_industrial
usage_profiles.description: Heavy industrial use with 6000-8000 operating hours per year, frequent load/unload cycles

usage_profiles.name: moderate_commercial
usage_profiles.description: Commercial/workshop use with 3000-5000 operating hours per year, moderate cycling

usage_profiles.name: light_intermittent
usage_profiles.description: Light duty or backup service with 1000-2000 operating hours per year

field_generation_rules.generation_logic: Base value 6.0-7.5 bar with gradual drift over thousands of hours due to sensor and control system aging
Oscillates between loading and unloading pressures, affected by system restrictions and sensor drift
Starts near 0.1 bar, gradually increases to 1.0 bar over service life due to element fouling
Baseline 60°C above ambient, increases with fouling, restrictions, and wear. Sensor drift affects accuracy
Rated capacity when loaded and healthy, reduced by filter restriction and element wear, zero when unloaded
Determined by air demand vs compressor capacity, affected by degradation reducing effective capacity
Loaded when pressure drops to loading pressure, unloaded when pressure reaches unloading pressure
Indicates if Elektronikon regulator is in automatic mode controlling load/unload cycles

degradation_model.accumulates_from: air volume processed and ambient dust levels

maintenance_model.trigger: air_filter_restriction exceeds threshold or scheduled hours
oil_separator_pressure_difference exceeds 1.0 bar or scheduled hours

failure_model.trigger_conditions: system_pressure cannot be maintained within regulation range

event_timing_model.arrival_process: Load/unload cycles arrive based on air demand patterns with typical cycle times of 10 seconds to 60 minutes. Maintenance events scheduled based on operating hours. Failures occur when degradation exceeds thresholds.
event_timing_model.notes: Pressure regulation events dominate normal operation. Maintenance events are scheduled but may be triggered early by condition monitoring. Failures are rare but critical events.

null_field_rules.reason: Compressor is stopped during maintenance activities
No air production during shutdown conditions
